title: cystopteris obtusa
intro: Cystopteris obtusa, also known as the Obtuse Bladder Fern, is a species of fern native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Cystopteris obtusa include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Cystopteris obtusa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
